blockingIssues.description: src/e2e/multi-device/ecdh-roundtrip.spec.ts validates relay REQ/EOSE transport but does not dispatch runtime ECDH and assert completion correlation by request_id.
src/e2e/multi-device/ecdh-roundtrip.spec.ts skips when the devtools binary is missing instead of only when cargo is unavailable, allowing unintended silent skips.
The added multi-device ECDH spec is a placeholder that never dispatches ECDH, never inspects pending operations, and never verifies ECDH completion by request_id.
Peer rows do not render last_seen progression after refresh completion; UI still shows static readiness/latency text, so VAL-OPS-010/011 observability is missing.
dashboardState.ts nonce depletion detection can false-positive when signing is blocked by policy, causing incorrect Syncing nonces/Trigger Sync UI without nonce exhaustion.
SigningFailedModal shows synthesized peer-response strings (for example "no peers responded") instead of real peer-response data from failure payloads.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require workers to explicitly mark deviations when agent-browser or Playwright verification steps are skipped, and prevent followedProcedure=true when required checks are absent.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple m1-ops handoffs reported followedProcedure=true while omitting required agent-browser/Playwright verification from runtime-worker and ui-screen-worker procedures.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Adjust runtime-worker and ui-screen-worker verification guidance to account for known baseline failures and scoped DEV-only features so required checks are strict but feasible.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviewers repeatedly observed conflicts between mandatory gallery/manual checks and known pre-existing failures or narrowly scoped DEV-gated changes.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a short handoff checklist item to prevent re-reporting known pre-existing issues in discoveredIssues.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Three m1-ops feature handoffs re-reported the tracked nested-button known issue despite AGENTS guidance saying not to.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Normalize relay port guidance to a single source of truth across mission artifacts (features.json and AGENTS.md).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m1-bootstrap-devtools-relay feature text referenced 8787-8799 while AGENTS.md allows only 8194.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Resolve the contract/model mismatch for SigningFailedModal peer-response ratio (either extend runtime failure payload shape or relax contract wording).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Validation contract expects peer-response ratio, but OperationFailure type currently lacks a peers-responded field.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated reports that known nested-button issue was re-listed in discoveredIssues.
Repeated reports that runtime-worker sessions omitted agent-browser interactive checks.
Repeated reports that ui-screen-worker sessions omitted agent-browser/playwright checks.
